title: Web UX Test Plan
description: A human-readable, structured web UX validation plan. Plans are authored in YAML, validated against this schema, and compiled to deterministic Playwright CLI tests.

schema_version.description: Plan schema version for forward compatibility.

id.description: Stable kebab-case plan identifier; also used as the spec file base name.

title.description: Human-readable plan title used as the Playwright test() name.

description.description: What this plan validates and why.

tags.description: Freeform labels (e.g. smoke, regression, accessibility) for filtering.

preconditions.description: Human-readable preconditions that must hold before the plan runs (data, feature flags, roles).

steps.description: Ordered deterministic steps. Each compiles to a Playwright test.step().

assertions.description: Optional trailing success-criteria assertions appended after steps. Each item should use an assert_* action.

cleanup.description: Steps run in an afterEach/finally block to undo side effects (e.g. delete created entity).

metadata.description: Authoring metadata (author, source workflow, related issue).
